chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1574 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.7867/2024 2. For hearing of CMA No.7227/2024 3. For hearing of main case. 25.03.2025 Mr. Iftikhar Hussain, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Sajjad Mangi, Advocate holding brief for Mr.Ameer Bukhsh Metlo, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Assistant Attorney General. The matter pertains to suspension of sales tax registration, which according to learned counsel for the petitioner has been unjustifiably suspended. The respective learned counsel jointly propose that the petitioner shall avail the remedy per section 21 Sales Tax Act, 1990, within the period of 15 days; the respondent department would decide the representation expeditiously vide a speaking order and after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner; pending such consideration, no further coercive action would be taken against the petitioner; any findings shall be subject to remedy before the appropriate forum and law. It is jointly submitted that this petition be disposed of as aforesaid. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
